title: mutisia microneura
intro: Mutisia microneura is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the 'Mountain Mutisia' due to its native habitats in the Andes mountains. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which contain flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The leaves of Mutisia microneura have been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and wounds, among other conditions, and have been reported to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, offering health benefits such as pain relief and immune system support. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to administer its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
